Petition For Order Settlinf First Account And Report Of Truatees And Allowing Compensation Of Trustees.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Botto for Philip Hudner and Robert Cabrera (Trustees).

There being no opposition or objection, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Wong.
